Clipboard Sync

Sync clipboard content across all your devices in real time. Join a room on each device, and clipboard entries flow between them automatically.

Privacy: Content is ephemeral and deleted when all devices leave. Use a hard-to-guess room name. Do not share sensitive data like passwords.

📡 Connected Devices (0)

    Automatically shares anything you copy with all devices in the room. Your browser will ask for clipboard permission once.
    ✓ Syncing actively
    Copy something, then tap Sync to share it with the room
    Enter a room name to connect.
